name: feature.kb.nodes
description: Knowledge Base feature node pack (ADR 0014 Phase 2) — workflow nodes over the `ctx.features.kb` surface shipped by the KB feature (ADR 0011). `search` retrieves chunks from one collection; `rag` retrieves + builds an augmented prompt + citations for an agent/callPrompt downstream. Action nodes — they read the tenant KB store (a side-effect), so their outputs are recorded and replay/fork read the recorded result.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: KB Search
nodes.description: Semantic search within one KB collection via ctx.features.kb.search. Inputs: { orgId, collectionId, query, topK? }. Output: { results }.

nodes.label: KB RAG (retrieve + augment)
nodes.description: Retrieve + assemble a grounded augmented prompt + citations via ctx.features.kb.rag. Inputs: { orgId, collectionId, query, topK? }. Output: { augmentedPrompt, citations, contexts } — feed augmentedPrompt to a downstream callPrompt/agent (generation is run-scoped).

nodes.label: KB List Collections
nodes.description: Lists an org's KB collections via ctx.features.kb.listCollections — discover a collectionId before search/rag. Inputs: { orgId }. Output: { collections }. Tenant-guarded.
